'''ER-1C''' was an [[ER-1 probe droid]] built by [[Graf Zapalo/Legends|Graf Zapalo]] and a team of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] engineers. ER-1C was put to work on [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]], aiding in the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] colonization of the moon.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']] {{1st}}
